overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The vehicle moves through wet reflective roads lined with holographic advertisements, cherry blossom trees, and futuristic glass architecture, encountering light traffic and other vehicles at intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with cherry blossom trees

events.description: vehicle slows down approaching right turn intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising through neon-lit street lined with pink cherry blossoms, slowing and turning right at intersection

entered.detail: pink flowering trees lining the left side of the street
large glowing advertisements and corporate signage in various colors
tall futuristic buildings with reflective glass facades
rain-soaked road surface reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through Night City's downtown. Pink cherry blossom trees line the left side while massive neon holographic billboards illuminate the street. The vehicle slows down and executes a right turn at an intersection, with wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with red ambient lighting

events.description: entering covered underpass with concrete structure overhead
making left turn at intersection after exiting underpass

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered underpass with red lighting, then turning left at intersection

entered.detail: overhead concrete bridge or tunnel structure creating partial cover
traditional-style red lanterns hanging along the street
bright yellow metal railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a semi-covered underpass with concrete overhead structure and red ambient lighting from paper lanterns. After passing through the sheltered section, the vehicle approaches an intersection and executes a left turn, transitioning into a different commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large digital billboards

events.description: passing other vehicles on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: cruising straight through commercial district with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: other car driving in same direction ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent 'KICK MALL' neon signage
massive flat-screen advertisements on building facades
high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: Driving through a bustling commercial district with the 'KICK MALL' building visible on the left and massive digital billboards on the right. The vehicle maintains a steady speed, passing other cars on the multi-lane wet road while surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements.

events.description: bright pink sports car crosses intersection from left to right
navigating through intersection and continuing straight

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, yielding to crossing pink sports car, then proceeding through

notable_agents.action: bright pink sports car crossing the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the road surface
illuminated traffic signals showing green for through traffic

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a wide intersection with visible crosswalk markings. A distinctive bright pink sports car crosses from left to right in front of the vehicle. After the intersection clears, the vehicle proceeds through, continuing down the neon-lit street with various storefronts and signage visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a neon-drenched metropolis, transitioning from a scenic boulevard into a sheltered underpass and finally into a dense commercial hub. It begins by gliding past pink cherry blossom trees and massive holographic billboards before slowing for a right turn across wet, reflective asphalt. As the vehicle enters a semi-covered underpass, the lighting shifts to a red ambient glow from paper lanterns, which then gives way to a left turn into a bustling district dominated by the Kick Mall and towering glass skyscrapers. The scene expands into a multi-lane thoroughfare filled with digital advertisements and other traffic, eventually reaching a wide intersection. Finally, the camera passes a bright pink sports car crossing the road before proceeding forward into a corridor of vibrant storefronts and glowing signage.
